message:
feat: improve validation, macro parsing, replica routing, schema introspection, and change tracking

validate.rs:
- Add validate_column_default() to check that DEFAULT expressions are
  syntactically valid SQL (balanced parens, quoted strings, function
  calls) before emitting DDL, catching malformed defaults at model
  definition time rather than at migration execution

parse.rs:
- Refactor attribute parsing to use a match-based dispatcher instead of
  chained if-else, improving readability and making it easier to add
  new #[sqlmodel(...)] attributes
- Normalize whitespace handling in attribute value extraction

replica.rs:
- Add query-complexity-aware routing: simple SELECT queries (no JOIN,
  subquery, or aggregate) are routed to replicas, while complex reads
  stay on the primary to avoid replication-lag inconsistencies
- New is_simple_select() heuristic checks for joins, subqueries,
  GROUP BY, HAVING, and window functions

schema/lib.rs:
- Extend introspection to capture CHECK constraints from
  information_schema.check_constraints, attaching them to the
  corresponding table's column metadata

change_tracker.rs:
- Track column-level diffs: ChangeTracker now records which specific
  columns changed (old_value, new_value) instead of just flagging the
  row as modified, enabling more precise audit logs and conflict
  detection in multi-writer scenarios

Beads sync: added 16 new tasks for planned improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
